name: Corn Bread Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the onions in butter until tender.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cornbread crumbs, salt, poultry seasoning, celery seed, parsley, and black pepper.
3. Add the cooked onion mixture to the bowl and stir well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
4. Heat the stuffing mixture gently, stirring frequently, until heated through but not browned.
5. Enough for a 4-pound bird.
